description: Creates Entra ID Conditional Access policies for per-role MFA enforcement, session controls, legacy auth blocking, geo-blocking, and service account IP restriction. Equivalent to Okta sign-on policies.

risk_profile_effects.standard: 24-hour employee sign-in frequency, 4-hour admin frequency, persistent browser allowed, legacy auth blocked, MFA for all users.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: 12-hour employee sign-in frequency, 2-hour admin frequency, no persistent browser, legacy auth blocked, MFA for all users.
risk_profile_effects.strict: 8-hour employee sign-in frequency, 1-hour admin frequency, no persistent browser, legacy auth blocked, MFA for all users.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls session timeouts, MFA enforcement, and browser persistence defaults.

employee_sign_in_frequency_hours.label: Employee Sign-In Frequency (hours)
employee_sign_in_frequency_hours.client_description: How often employees must re-authenticate. Lower values are more secure but less convenient. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

admin_sign_in_frequency_hours.label: Admin Sign-In Frequency (hours)
admin_sign_in_frequency_hours.client_description: How often administrators must re-authenticate. Admins should re-authenticate more frequently than regular users. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

persistent_browser_session.label: Allow Persistent Browser Sessions
persistent_browser_session.client_description: Whether employees can keep their browser session after closing the browser. Disabled for Elevated and Strict profiles. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

require_mfa_for_admins.label: Require MFA for Admins
require_mfa_for_admins.client_description: Require MFA for all admin role assignments. Strongly recommended — leave enabled.

require_mfa_for_all_users.label: Require MFA for All Users
require_mfa_for_all_users.client_description: Require MFA for all users across the tenant. Strongly recommended — leave enabled.

contractor_sign_in_frequency_hours.label: Contractor Sign-In Frequency (hours)
contractor_sign_in_frequency_hours.client_description: How often contractors must re-authenticate. Contractors are typically given shorter sessions than employees due to third-party risk. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

block_legacy_auth.label: Block Legacy Authentication
block_legacy_auth.client_description: Block legacy authentication protocols (IMAP, POP3, SMTP basic auth). Legacy auth cannot enforce MFA and is the #1 attack vector for credential stuffing. Strongly recommended — leave enabled.

outputs.block_legacy_auth_policy_id: Conditional Access policy ID for blocking legacy authentication
outputs.admin_mfa_policy_id: Conditional Access policy ID for admin MFA requirement
outputs.employee_mfa_policy_id: Conditional Access policy ID for employee MFA requirement
outputs.block_ofac_policy_id: Conditional Access policy ID for OFAC geo-blocking
outputs.block_high_risk_policy_id: Conditional Access policy ID for high-risk country geo-blocking
